title: Claude Fable 5 beats Pokémon FireRed only using vision
summary: Claude 3.5 played and completed Pokémon FireRed using only raw game screenshots without maps or external state information. This demonstrates multimodal vision capability in a complex sequential task requiring navigation, decision-making, and long-horizon planning without auxiliary aids.
writeup: The video documents Claude 3.5 completing Pokémon FireRed using only raw game screenshots, with no maps or external state information supplied. It matters as a test of multimodal vision in a complex sequential task that demands navigation, decision-making, and long-horizon planning. The key takeaway: the model handled the full playthrough from vision alone, without auxiliary aids.
